title: Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) Implementation
subtitle: ATCA Regulation 2026-9A
summary: The ATCA is implementing the initial transitional phase of the Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM). During this phase, importers of covered goods must report the greenhouse gas emissions (GHG) embedded in their imports.

sections.text: The regulation currently applies to the following sectors:
Importers must submit a quarterly CBAM declaration detailing:

items: Total quantity of covered goods imported.
Total embedded direct and indirect emissions (metric tons CO2e).
Any carbon price paid in the country of origin.

sections.text: The first quarterly report (for Q4 2027) is due by January 31, 2028. Failure to report may result in a penalty of $55 to $160 per tonne of unreported emissions.
